description: 100 NL2SQL cases. 35 easy + 40 medium + 25 hard. Row counts verified against live DB (posts=1955, topics=20, entities=441, authors=1681).

cases.nl_query: How many posts are there in total?
How many distinct topics are there?
How many total entities are there in the database?
How many distinct authors have posted?
What is the average like count per post?
What are the top 3 topics by number of posts?
How many entities have a mention count greater than 10?
How many posts have an emotion score above 0.5?
What is the name of the entity with the highest mention count?
What are the top 5 entities by mention count?
What is the maximum like count among all posts?
What is the minimum like count among all posts?
What is the total like count across all posts?
How many entities are of type LOC?
How many entities are of type PERSON?
How many entities are of type ORG?
How many posts have a like count between 100 and 500?
How many posts have a like count above 1000?
How many posts have a like count above 5000?
Which topic has the fewest posts?
What is the average mention count across all entities?
How many entities have a mention count of exactly 1?
What are the top 10 entities by mention count?
How many posts have a like count above 10000?
List all distinct entity types in the database
How many posts are in the topic about Ongoing Challenges in Russia-Ukraine Conflict?
How many posts are in the topic about Tensions and Military Presence in Strait?
How many posts are in the topic about Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship?
How many posts are in the topic about Drone Strikes and Air Defense in Moscow?
How many posts are in the topic about Shift Towards Electric and Hybrid Vehicles?
How many posts are in the topic about Iran-US Relations and Geopolitical Tensions?
How many posts are in the topic about Criticism of Trump's Renewable Energy Policies?
How many posts are in the topic about Global Tensions and Energy Independence?
How many posts are in the topic about Random and Chaotic Humor Exchange?
How many posts are in the topic about Criticism of Political and Corporate Manipulation?
Which topics have more than 100 posts?
Which topics have fewer than 70 posts?
How many posts belong to topics that have more than 100 posts each?
cases.notes: Sum of posts in high-traffic topics

cases.nl_query: Which authors have posted more than 3 times?
What is the total post count for the Russia-Ukraine conflict topic?
How many posts are associated with entities related to Iran?
cases.notes: Join posts with entities WHERE name='Iran'

cases.nl_query: Count posts per topic and show topics with fewer than 50 posts
What are the top 5 authors who posted the most in the database?
How many posts have a like count greater than 500?
Show the distribution of posts across topics: list each topic label and its post count, ordered by post count descending
Which topics contain posts mentioning both Ukraine and Russia entities?
How many posts are associated with entities related to Russia?
How many posts are associated with entities related to Trump?
How many posts are associated with entities related to Ukraine?
How many posts are associated with entities related to China?
Which authors have posted more than 5 times?
What is the average like count for posts in the Russia-Ukraine topic?
What is the average like count for posts in the Iran-US topic?
Which entities have a mention count between 10 and 50?
How many LOC entities have more than 5 mentions?
List topics sorted by post count ascending
How many posts have a like count above the average like count?
Which 3 topics have the highest total like count?
cases.notes: GROUP BY topic SUM(like_count) DESC LIMIT 3

cases.nl_query: How many posts mention both Iran and UAE in their entities?
How many posts mention both Russia and Ukraine in their entities?
How many posts mention both Trump and US in their entities?
What is the total like count for the top 5 most-liked posts?
cases.notes: Top posts have very high like counts

cases.nl_query: Which topics have post counts between 70 and 120?
How many posts are there per entity type (through post_entities join)?
What percentage of posts have an emotion score above 0?
Which authors have posted exactly once?
What is the median-like topic by post count (the 10th ranked topic out of 20)?
How many posts are there for each entity type when joining through post_entities?
Find all topics with a post count above the average topic post count
How many PERSON entities have a mention count above 5?
Which topics contain posts mentioning both Ukraine and Russia entities?
How many entities have a mention count above the average mention count?
Find the top 3 entities co-occurring most frequently in the same posts, along with their co-occurrence count
For each topic with more than 50 posts, calculate the ratio of posts with emotion score above 0 to total posts in that topic
cases.notes: Complex GROUP BY with conditional aggregation and HAVING

cases.nl_query: Find authors who posted in more than one topic, and show how many distinct topics each appears in
Rank all topics by total like count of their posts using a window function, and show the top 5
For each author who has posted at least 3 times, compute their average like count and rank them by average likes descending, showing top 5
cases.notes: GROUP BY HAVING COUNT>=3, ORDER BY AVG DESC LIMIT 5

cases.nl_query: Find topics where the average like count per post is above 200, ordered by average likes descending
For each entity type, find the entity with the highest mention count
cases.notes: GROUP BY entity_type with MAX subquery

cases.nl_query: Find the top 5 posts with the most entity mentions, showing post_id and entity count
cases.notes: GROUP BY post_id from post_entities_v2 ORDER BY count DESC

cases.nl_query: Using a window function, show the cumulative post count by topic ordered by topic post count descending
Find all pairs of topics that share at least 3 common entity mentions
cases.notes: Complex join between topics, posts, post_entities

cases.nl_query: For each topic, calculate the percentage of its posts that contain at least one entity mention
Show the top 3 topics by number of unique authors who posted in them
Find authors who appear in both the Iran-US topic and the Russia-Ukraine topic
cases.notes: Intersect of authors across two topics

cases.nl_query: Rank entities by mention count using DENSE_RANK() and show the top 10 with their ranks
cases.notes: DENSE_RANK() OVER ORDER BY mention_count DESC

cases.nl_query: For each topic, find the most prolific author (the one with the most posts in that topic)
cases.notes: GROUP BY topic + author with ROW_NUMBER or subquery

cases.nl_query: Calculate the Pearson-style correlation between post like count and emotion score across all posts
Find the topic with the highest variance in like count among its posts
cases.notes: STDDEV or VAR_POP per topic GROUP BY

cases.nl_query: Show how many new authors (authors who only posted in one topic) each topic has
Find the top 5 entity pairs that co-occur most often across all posts
cases.notes: Self-join post_entities a, b WHERE a.post_id=b.post_id AND a.entity_id < b.entity_id

cases.nl_query: For each month (if timestamps are available), count how many posts were made
Using a CTE, find the average like count for posts in the top 3 most-discussed topics
cases.notes: WITH cte AS (top3 topics) JOIN posts

cases.nl_query: Find the entity that appears in the most distinct topics
cases.notes: COUNT DISTINCT topic_id per entity through joins

cases.nl_query: Show the like count percentile distribution: how many posts are in p25, p50, p75, p90
Find topics where more than 30% of posts have emotion scores above 0.3
Using window functions, show each topic's post count relative to the total, as a percentage
Find all authors who have posted in at least 5 different topics
cases.notes: GROUP BY author HAVING COUNT DISTINCT topics >= 5

cases.nl_query: For each entity type, calculate the total mention count and average mention count per entity
cases.notes: GROUP BY entity_type with SUM and AVG

cases.nl_query: Find the post with the most entity mentions and show its topic, author, and like count
cases.notes: Subquery: post with MAX entity count, then JOIN
